This file demonstrates malformed JSON that the validator must reject.
It is intentionally not valid JSON.

{
  "doc_id": "article-malformed-001",
  "stance_events": [
    {
      "politician": "Joe Biden",
      "topic": "economy",
      "normalized_proposition": "Biden supports economic recovery."
      "stance_direction": "support",
      "stance_mode": "statement",
      "evidence_role": "direct_quote",
      "confidence": 0.9
    }
  ]
}
